subject: Add Session recv timeout + rt_gdbstub_timeout driver
description: gdbstub::Session::recv_byte currently uses blocking ::recv with no SO_RCVTIMEO; a stub that accepts but never responds will hang vsim. Add 5s socket recv timeout. Add rt_gdbstub_timeout.sh + stub binary that listens on the gdb port and stays silent. Assert vsim exit != 0, runtime < 30s. Wire into CMake.
activeForm: Adding Session recv timeout and rt_gdbstub_timeout driver
